name: diff-review
description: Save file versions, compare them with colored diff or side-by-side view, and roll back to any version.
intent_triggers: 幫我比較兩個版本的差異
看一下這個檔案改了什麼
save this file version for comparison
compare two versions side by side
show me the diff between versions
roll back to a previous version
list all saved versions of a file

command.description: Sub-command: save, compare, list, stats, restore

note.description: Optional note for the saved version

current.description: Compare current file with last saved version

examples.intent: 儲存當前檔案為一個版本

error_codes.3: No versions exist for the file
